template_data.sub: Teaming agreements are letters of intent — not contracts. Workshare splits aren't guaranteed until they're in writing.

image_headline: SIGNED DOESN'T MEAN PROTECTED. KNOW YOUR AGREEMENT.
image_prompt: Split-panel infographic. Left panel dark navy, bold label 'THE MYTH' with red X icon, two short myth labels: 'SIGNED = SAFE', 'SPLIT GUARANTEED'. Right panel white, bold label 'THE REALITY' with green checkmarks, three short labels: 'LETTERS OF INTENT', 'PRIME DECIDES', 'DEFINE WORKSHARE'. Center: illustrated professional in suit reviewing a contract document, expression uncertain. Bold headline top: 'SIGNED DOESN'T MEAN PROTECTED'. Footer text: 'Josh Ladick · GSA Focus'.
